rules.name: Metro bundler crash
rules.pattern: error: Metro has encountered an error|BUNDLE\s+.*failed
rules.suggestion: Check for syntax errors in recently changed files. Run `npx expo start` locally to reproduce.

rules.name: EAS build failure
rules.suggestion: Check EAS build logs at expo.dev. Common causes: missing native dependencies, invalid app.json config.

rules.name: npm install failure
rules.suggestion: Dependency resolution issue. Try `npm ci --legacy-peer-deps` or check for conflicting peer dependencies.

rules.name: Out of memory
rules.pattern: FATAL ERROR.*heap|JavaScript heap out of memory|ENOMEM
rules.suggestion: Build ran out of memory. Consider increasing Node memory with NODE_OPTIONS=--max_old_space_size=4096.

rules.name: Xcode build error
rules.pattern: xcodebuild.*error|Build input file cannot be found|Signing.*error
rules.suggestion: iOS native build issue. Check Xcode project settings, provisioning profiles, and pod install status.
